name: spot-react-integration
description: Integration guide for @orbs-network/spot-react into a DEX frontend. Covers SpotProvider setup, DEX swap-state adapters, walletInteractions, hook-driven panels for TWAP, Limit, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit orders, @orbs-network/swap-ui order flow modal content, lifecycle callbacks, order history, visual reference screenshots, and DEX-native styling.
